prompt: Read src/domains/battle_engine/mod.rs. Find every new_unchecked() call. For each one classify it as: CONSTANT (hardcoded literal like 100 — safe), COMPUTED (arithmetic result like hp - damage — needs validation), RUNTIME (from save data, user input, or deserialized values — must use new()). Return JSON: {findings: [{line: N, type: 'Hp/BaseStat/Gold/etc', value_source: 'CONSTANT|COMPUTED|RUNTIME', expression: 'the code', risk: 'description if COMPUTED or RUNTIME'}], summary: {constant: N, computed: N, runtime: N}}
